system.description:
### Tier 2 Skulk An Asari mercenary clad in yellow armor, crackling with biotic energy. Motives & Tactics: Charge in, flank, biotic detonation

#### Features Biotic Charge - Action: Mark a Stress. The Vanguard dissolves into blue energy and reappears within Melee range of a target within Far range, immediately making a standard attack. If the attack hits, the target is knocked back to Close range and became Vulnerable.

Warp Ammo - Passive: The Vanguard deals +1d8 damage against targets who have at least 1 active Shield Slot.

Biotic Barrier Initialization - Reaction: When Vangard enters the battlefield, add 3 Biotic Barrier tokens.

Barrier - Reaction: When the Vanguard takes Physical damage, you can Spend a Fear and remove a Biotic Barrier token to reduce the damage by 1d10.

}}

{{adversary,
